desc: Click to Consume: Grants detection of nearby invisible units for up to 4 minutes. Revealing a ward in this manner grants a portion of the gold reward for killing that unit.

name: Red Trinket
desc:
Active s
Reveals enemy wards in the area for 8 seconds.

name: Sight Ward
desc: Click to Consume: Places an invisible ward that reveals the surrounding area for 3 minutes.

name: Vision Ward
desc: Click to Consume: Places an invisible ward that reveals the surrounding area and invisible units in the area for 3 minutes. Revealing a ward in this manner grants a portion of the gold reward when that unit is killed.

name: Yellow Trinket
desc:
Active s
Places an Invisible Stealth Ward that grants vision for 75 seconds.
